advice.summary: You completed a full-body weight training session, contributing to your strength goals. Your recent runs indicate a good balance between easy runs and quality workouts.
advice.focus: Continue to incorporate strength training while gradually increasing your running distance.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy run of 6-8 km at a comfortable pace to maintain aerobic fitness.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during runs to avoid overexertion, especially after strength sessions.
